aiPrompt:
I want to create a PinPlay quiz in JSON format with these requirements:
Theme: Irregular Verbs
Language: English
Level: 4th of ESO
Feel: Fun
TimeLimit: 30
QuestionCount: 20
IncludeImages: true
IncludeAudio: true
AnswerTypes: balanced
Goal: More learning (scaffolded)

CRITICAL RULES FOR ASSETS:
1. IMAGES: Set "imageData" to "" and instead provide a descriptive "imageKeyword" (1-2 words). The app will auto-search for the image.
2. AUDIO: Use "audioMode": "tts" and provide the "audioText" to be spoken. Set "audioData" to "". 
3. GLOBAL AUDIO: You can set "readAllQuestionsAloud": true at the top level to enable quiz-wide TTS.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
Provide a valid PinPlay JSON version 3. Follow the structure and patterns in the example template provided.
Refer to the #Explanations# section in the attached JSON for technical constraints and app possibilities for each question type.
Supported types: mcq, multi, tf, text, context_gap, match_pairs, error_hunt, puzzle, slider, pin, audio, speaking.

mcq.name: Multiple Choice (Single)
mcq.rules: Standard question with up to 10 options. Only one correct answer.

multi.name: Multiple Choice (Select All)
multi.rules: Up to 10 options. Multiple correct answers possible.

text.name: Typed Answer
text.rules: Students type the answer. Case-insensitive matching.

context_gap.name: Gap Fill (Fill in Blank)
context_gap.rules: Use four underscores (____) in the prompt to mark a gap. The 'gaps' array must contain the correct words in order.

match_pairs.name: Match Pairs
match_pairs.rules: Students match items from the left col to the right col. Define as pairs.

error_hunt.name: Error Hunting
error_hunt.rules: The prompt is a sentence with errors. Students tap words (tokens) they think are wrong. 'corrected' must be the full fixed sentence.

puzzle.name: Puzzle (Reorder)
puzzle.rules: Unordered list of words or items that students must drag into the correct order.

slider.name: Numeric Slider
slider.rules: Numeric target value on a range with a margin of error ('none', 'low', 'medium', 'high', 'maximum').

pin.name: Pin the Spot
pin.rules: Click on specific areas (zones) of an image. Zones use x, y percentages (0-100) and r (radius).

open.name: Open Answer
open.rules: Critical thinking or research task. No auto-grading. Teacher grades manually later.

image_open.name: Visual Open Question
image_open.rules: Like Open Answer but focuses on interpreting the primary image.

speaking.name: Speaking Task
speaking.rules: Voice-enabled answer. Students record/speak their answer in class. Teacher grades manually.

questions.prompt: True or False: This is a mountain.
Name the color of the car.
I went to the ____ and bought some ____.
questions.audioText: I went to the blank and bought some blank.

questions.prompt: Match the animals to their sounds.
questions.audioText: Match these animals with their sounds.

questions.prompt: He go to school every days.
questions.audioText: He go to school every days.
questions.corrected: He goes to school every day.
correctedVariants: He goes to school every day.

questions.prompt: Describe the weather in one sentence.
questions.audioText: Please describe the weather you see.

questions.prompt: Say a sentence about this picture.
questions.audioText: Tell me something about this image.

questions.prompt: Reorder the words to form a sentence.
How many books do you read per year?

questions.audioText: Where are the joysticks on this controller?
